name: libconfig-inifiles-perl
title: libconfig-inifiles-perl
description:
read .ini-style configuration files
Config::IniFiles provides a way to have readable configuration files
outside your Perl script. Configurations can be imported (inherited,
stacked, ...), sections can be grouped, and settings can be accessed
from a tied hash.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libconfig-inifiles-perl because read .ini-style configuration files.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libconfig-inifiles-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libconfig-inifiles-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libconfig-inifiles-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
